This means the left panel's vertical bars in rows 47-49 have been removed, even though I never clicked on them.
Wait, but I did click on the right panel's vertical bars in rows 47-49 (columns 2 and 3). Maybe clicking on the right panel also affects the left panel?
Actually, let me check more carefully. The left panel shows:

- Rows 47-49: 'BgggggggBggggBggggBggggBgggggggB' - vertical bars REMOVED (B) at cols 9, 15, 21, 27
So the left panel's vertical bars in rows 47-49 have been removed. This happened when I clicked on the right panel's vertical bars in rows 47-49 (columns 2 and 3).
But the left panel's vertical bars in rows 35-37 and 41-43 are still present. I also clicked on the right panel's vertical bars in rows 35-37 and 41-43 (columns 2 and 3). So why didn't those get removed in the left panel?
Wait, let me reconsider. Maybe the left panel is showing which elements have been "activated" or "selected", and the activation is based on the row, not the column. When I clicked on the right panel's vertical bars in rows 47-49, it activated the left panel's vertical bars in rows 47-49.

Actually, let me check the order of my actions. I clicked on:
1. Right panel horizontal bars: rows 33, 39, 45 (columns 2 and 3)
2. Right panel horizontal bars: rows 33, 39, 45 (columns 1 and 4)
3. Right panel vertical bars: rows 36, 42, 48 (columns 2 and 3)

- Row 36 is in the group rows 35-37
- Row 42 is in the group rows 41-43
- Row 48 is in the group rows 47-49
So I clicked on vertical bars in all three groups. But only the left panel's vertical bars in rows 47-49 were removed.
Hmm, this is confusing. Let me think about this differently.
Actually, wait. Let me re-examine the left panel. The left panel shows:
- Rows 35-37: 'BgggggggwggggwggggwggggwgggggggB' - vertical bars present (w)
- Rows 41-43: 'BgggggggwggggwggggwggggwgggggggB' - vertical bars present (w)
- Rows 47-49: 'BgggggggBggggBggggBggggBgggggggB' - vertical bars REMOVED (B)
But I clicked on vertical bars in rows 36, 42, and 48. So all three groups should have been affected. But only rows 47-49 were affected.
Wait, maybe the left panel is showing which elements have been "activated" based on the ROW of the click, not the column. When I clicked on row 48, it activated the left panel's vertical bars in rows 47-49. But when I clicked on rows 36 and 42, something else happened.
